creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Prague BSD Group

The small BSD user group from Brmlab Prague/CzechRepublic Hackerspace.We are a group of hobbyists, professionals, and enthusiasts. For more information on our events, please check our website https://brmlab.cz/event/bsdmeeting or mailing list.

Website: https://brmlab.cz/event/bsdmeeting

Thx M.
